meaning: adj.枯萎的,被害的,被诅咒的
examples: He blasted the ball past the goalie.
The tunnel was blasted out of solid rock.
They blasted a huge crater in the runway.
Music vendors, tucked into burrow-like railway arches, blasted the Caribbean sounds of Reggaeton from their waist-high amplifiers.
The ship departed the wind-blasted town of Puerto Natales at first light, with passengers boarding the night before.
